title: Crispy Sour Spanish Almond Salad
description: A bright, tangy salad featuring toasted almonds, crisp pickles and a zesty citrusvinegar dressing, perfect for monsoon afternoons.

ingredients.name: Almonds, raw
ingredients.notes: toasted at 160°C for 8‑10 minutes, then cooled

instructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 160°C (320°F). Spread the almonds on a baking sheet and toast for 8‑10 minutes or until lightly golden, stirring every 3 minutes. Remove and let cool, then roughly chop.
2. Dice the cucumber into bite‑size cubes. Drain the pickled onions and measure out 1/2 cup.
3. In a small bowl whisk together the red wine vinegar, lemon juice, olive oil, smoked paprika, salt and pepper to form the dressing.
4. In a large salad bowl combine the toasted almonds, diced cucumber, pickled onions, capers and a splash of water to loosen the mix.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently until all ingredients are coated.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt, pepper or lemon juice if desired.
7. Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to marry.
8. Serve chilled or at room temperature, garnished with a few extra toasted almonds for extra crunch.
